text:
(a) **17 open pull requests** total across all repositories.

(b) **acme/infra** has the most, with **9 open PRs**. Full breakdown:

| Repo | Open PRs |
|---|---|
| **acme/infra** | **9** |
| acme/web | 4 |
| acme/api | 3 |
| acme/mobile | 1 |

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT repo, COUNT(*) AS open_prs FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' GROUP BY repo ORDER BY open_prs DESC;"}
